name: lets-restore-root
description: Let's Restore - File Recovery & Versioning Desktop App

scripts.setup: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../electron && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://localhost:5173 && wait-on http://localhost:3847 && cd electron && npm start
